CREATE TABLE numbers (base FLOAT, exponent FLOAT);
SELECT base, exponent, base ** exponent AS result FROM numbers;
WITH calc AS (SELECT base, exponent, base ** exponent AS power FROM numbers) SELECT base, power FROM calc WHERE power > 5;
SELECT a.base, b.exponent, a.base ** b.exponent AS power FROM numbers a JOIN numbers b ON a.base = 2 AND b.exponent > 1;
SELECT id, (1.5 ** (id % 4)) AS power FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS id FROM numbers) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT base, exponent, base ** exponent AS power FROM numbers;
SELECT AVG(base ** exponent) AS avg_power FROM results;
SELECT base ** -1 AS inverse_power FROM numbers WHERE exponent = 0;
